items.name: scheduler
items.title: Scheduler
items.description: A flexible shift scheduling component with day, week, month, year, and list views. Supports drag-and-drop, categories, staff filtering, and prefetching.

items.name: scheduler-tv
items.title: Scheduler (TV)
items.description: TV-domain scheduler: Channel/Program vocabulary, 24h range, timeline view, live indicator. Uses preset "tv" with day, week, month, and timeline views.
